name: Yuri Nakamura
description:
__Height__: 165 cm

Yuri Nakamura is the founder and leader of the Afterlife-based school organization Shinda Sekai Sensen (SSS). She leads the campaign of the many students who fight against God, whom they blame for their cruel fates. 

~!She met [Hinata](https://anilist.co/character/24503/Hideki-Hinata) before Angel discovered him, and managed to convince him to form the SSS (Shinda Sekai Sensen) with her.!~

~!When she was alive, she had three younger siblings, whom she tried to protect, but unfortunately died during a burglary in her house. It has not been revealed how exactly she died, though it is strongly implied that it was via a gun.!~
